scripts.build: npm --prefix tat-cli run build && npm --prefix vscode-extension run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix tat-cli run lint && npm --prefix vscode-extension run lint && npm run lint:shared
scripts.test: npm --prefix tat-cli test && npm --prefix tat-cli exec vitest run vscode-extension/tests packages/tat-shared/tests --config tat-cli/vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:contracts: npm --prefix tat-cli exec vitest run tests/contracts --config tat-cli/vitest.config.ts
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run test:contracts
